name: NeurIPS 2026
scope: General-interest machine learning, deep learning, reinforcement learning, optimization, statistical learning theory, probabilistic methods, neuroscience, biological learning, foundation models, generative AI, alignment and safety, and applications across vision, language, robotics, and the sciences.

name: ICML 2026
scope: Core machine learning research: representation learning, optimization, theory, deep learning, reinforcement learning, probabilistic methods, kernel methods, online learning, applications.

name: ICLR 2026
scope: Representation learning. Deep learning theory and practice, generative models, self-supervised learning, multimodal models, training methods, scaling, alignment.

name: AAAI 2026
scope: Broad AI: knowledge representation, planning, search, reasoning, multi-agent systems, machine learning, NLP, vision, robotics, AI for social good.

name: ACL 2026
scope: Computational linguistics and natural language processing: language models, dialogue, summarization, translation, semantics, syntax, multilinguality, evaluation.

name: EMNLP 2026
scope: Empirical methods in NLP: language modeling, retrieval, structured prediction, generation, evaluation, interpretability, multilingual NLP.

name: KDD 2026
scope: Data mining, knowledge discovery, applied machine learning, large-scale data systems, recommender systems, graph learning, anomaly detection.

name: CVPR 2026
scope: Computer vision and pattern recognition: detection, segmentation, generation, 3D reconstruction, video understanding, embodied vision, multimodal.

name: ICCV 2027
scope: International Conference on Computer Vision. Vision, 3D, video, multimodal, generative models.

name: MLSys 2026
scope: Systems for ML: training infrastructure, inference serving, hardware accelerators, distributed training, efficient algorithms, model compression, ML for systems.

name: ML4H 2026
scope: Machine Learning for Health: clinical NLP, medical imaging, EHR mining, biomedical knowledge graphs, predictive modeling, fairness in clinical AI, multimodal medical AI, LLM applications in clinical workflows, clinical agent observability.

name: CHIL 2026
scope: Conference on Health, Inference, and Learning. Methods + applications of ML in health, including causal inference, fairness, deployment, clinical decision support.

name: AMIA 2026 Annual Symposium
scope: Biomedical and health informatics: clinical informatics, public health, translational bioinformatics, consumer health, education, applied AI in healthcare operations.

name: MICCAI 2026
scope: Medical image computing and computer-assisted intervention: segmentation, registration, surgical guidance, computational pathology, deep learning for medical imaging.

name: UIST 2026
scope: User interfaces and interactive systems: HCI, novel interactions, intelligent UIs, AI-assisted tools, mixed reality, accessibility.

name: CHI 2027
scope: Human-computer interaction. Empirical studies, novel interfaces, AI-and-HCI, accessibility, social computing.

name: ACM FAccT 2026
scope: Fairness, accountability, and transparency in sociotechnical systems: algorithmic audits, bias measurement, governance, deployment studies.

name: NeurIPS 2025 Workshop: GenAI for Health
scope: Workshop on generative AI for healthcare: LLMs for clinical text, multimodal medical generation, evaluation, safety, deployment case studies.

name: ICLR 2026 Workshop on Agentic AI
scope: Agentic AI systems: tool-using LLMs, multi-step reasoning, planning, evaluation of agents, autonomous coding, agent observability.

name: ICML 2026 Workshop on LLM Systems
scope: Systems-of-LLMs: prompting infrastructure, retrieval-augmented generation, agent frameworks, observability, evaluation harnesses, cost-aware serving.

name: NeurIPS 2026 Workshop on Evaluation of Foundation Models
scope: How we evaluate foundation models in practice: benchmarks, leakage, calibration, human-in-the-loop, scaling laws of evaluation.

name: ClinicalNLP 2026 Workshop @ NAACL
scope: Clinical NLP: notes summarization, ICD coding, entity extraction, de-identification, clinical reasoning with LLMs.

name: ICLR 2026 Workshop on Safety in Generative AI
scope: AI safety: red teaming, alignment, adversarial robustness, jailbreaks, model cards, auditing.

name: ML4H 2025 Findings Track
scope: Workshop track for clinical ML preliminary results, negative results, case studies. Wide topic scope including healthcare LLM agents.

name: NeurIPS 2026 Workshop on Observability for AI
scope: Observability tooling for AI agents and LLM applications: tracing, evaluation in prod, drift detection, cost attribution, healthcare-grade audit logs.

name: RSNA 2026
scope: Radiology + AI in medical imaging. Scientific presentations and posters.

name: SIGIR 2026
scope: Information retrieval, search engines, ranking, recommender systems, conversational IR, retrieval-augmented generation.

name: The Web Conference 2026
scope: Web technologies: crawling, search, social networks, web applications, large-scale ML on the web, agentic browsers.

name: WSDM 2026
scope: Web search and data mining: ranking, social network analysis, recommender systems, A/B testing.

name: NAACL 2026
scope: North American chapter of ACL. Same scope as ACL: NLP, language models, dialogue, translation, semantics.

name: UAI 2026
scope: Uncertainty in AI: probabilistic graphical models, Bayesian inference, causal inference, probabilistic programming.

name: AISTATS 2026
scope: AI and statistics: theory of machine learning, kernel methods, Bayesian, optimization, statistical learning.

name: ICLR 2026 Workshop on ML for Healthcare
scope: Workshop on ML for healthcare: clinical LLM agents, multimodal medical AI, deployment studies, fairness, evaluation.

name: ICDH 2026 (Digital Health)
scope: IEEE International Conference on Digital Health: digital therapeutics, remote monitoring, clinical decision support, healthcare ops automation.

name: Machine Learning for Healthcare 2026 (MLHC)
scope: Methods and deployment of ML in clinical care. Hospital data, multimodal records, fairness, reliability, agent-assisted workflows.

name: ICLR 2026 Workshop on AI for Code
scope: AI for programming: code generation, repository understanding, agentic developers, eval benchmarks.

name: SciPy 2026
scope: Scientific computing in Python: data tools, scientific software, reproducibility, applications.

name: PyData NYC 2026
scope: Data science and engineering with Python. Practitioner-track talks; informal write-ups.

name: JRSS-B Discussion Paper Track
scope: Journal of the Royal Statistical Society. Statistical methodology, including ML theory and applications.

name: Patterns (Cell Press)
scope: Cell Press journal on data science and ML across the sciences and applied domains, including healthcare.

name: npj Digital Medicine
scope: Nature Partner Journal on digital medicine: clinical AI, wearable health, telemedicine, deployment evidence.
